whyMessaging.title: Mun kosɔn Messaging Platkosɔnms Matter Wɛrɛ Than Ever
whyMessaging.intro: Messaging platkosɔnms have become one ka most important minɛnw kosɔn kumakan kɔnɔ bi’s world. Ka bɔ yɛrɛ ta barow ka taa baara interactions, messaging aplikeesɔns bɛɛow people ka taa stay connected instantly ani efficiently.
whyMessaging.everydayDesc: People rely kan messaging aplikeesɔns kosɔn daily kumakan ni teris, somɔgɔw, ani colleagues. Whether it's quick update walima long baro, messaging provides convenient ani flexible way ka taa stay kɔnɔ touch.
whyMessaging.speedDesc: One ka main advantages ka messaging platkosɔnms ye their speed. Mesajw ye delivered instantly, bɛɛowing baarakɛlaw ka taa communicate kɔnɔ real time. Nin level ka convenience has made messaging preferred method ka kumakan kosɔn mdɔ o dɔ people.
whyMessaging.globalDesc: Messaging platkosɔnms connect people across globe. Ni internet access, baarakɛlaw bɛ se ka communicate regarddɔgɔman ka location, making it easier ka taa build relationships ani collaborate internationbɛɛy.
whyMessaging.privacyDesc: Modern messaging platkosɔnms focus kan giving baarakɛlaw jɔyɔrɔ over their data ani barow. Fɛn nafamaw like gundolali, gundoya labɛnw, ani mesaj jɔyɔrɔs bɛɛow baarakɛlaw ka taa communicate ni confidence.
whyMessaging.futureDesc: Messaging continues ka taa evolve ni kura fɛn nafamaw such as AI-poanred responses, bamanankan na bɔli, ani multimedia tilali. As techayilogy advances, messaging platkosɔnms bɛ na become even wɛrɛ poanrful ani versatile.
whyMessaging.outro: Chatkosɔnia ye built ni ninw principles kɔnɔ mind, offering fast, lakanalen, ani baarakɛla-terily messaging experience kosɔn connected world.

global.title: Sinikɛnɛ ka Duniya bɛɛ Kumakan
global.intro: Kumakan has evolved rapidly over past few decades. Mun once ka kan phone anleliw walima in-person meetings bɛ se ka sisan kɛ done teliya la fɛ messaging platkosɔnms. As techayilogy continues ka taa advance, duniya bɛɛ kumakan ye becoming faster, wɛrɛ accessible, ani wɛrɛ inclusive.
global.barriersDesc: One ka biggest yɛlɛmaw kɔnɔ kumakan ye reduction ka geographic barriers. People bɛ se ka sisan connect ni wɛrɛs across world kɔnɔ near real time. Whether kosɔn yɛrɛ ta barow, baara, walima collaboration, messaging platkosɔnms have made distance far dɔgɔman limiting.
global.translationTitle: Role ka Bamanankan na bɔli Techayilogy
global.translationDesc: Kan has traditionbɛɛy been one ka biggest obstacles ka taa duniya bɛɛ kumakan. Bi, built-in bamanankan na bɔli minɛnw help bridge o gap. Platkosɔnms like Chatkosɔnia bɛɛow baarakɛlaw ka taa communicate wɛrɛ nɔgɔya la even ni they speak different kans, creating kura opportunities kosɔn connection ani understanding.
global.realtimeDesc: Speed ye key factor shaping modern kumakan. Baarakɛlaw expect mesajw ka taa kɛ delivered teliya la, ani modern infrastructure dɛmɛs o expectation. Real-time messaging kɛs wɛrɛ natural ani fluid barow.
global.privacyDesc: As kumakan becomes wɛrɛ digital, gundoya ani lakanali ye increasingly important. Baarakɛlaw want confidence o their barow ye protected. Fɛn nafamaw like gundolali ani baarakɛla-jɔyɔrɔled labɛnw help dɛmɛ wɛrɛ lakanalen kumakan experience.
global.futureDesc: sinikɛnɛ ka duniya bɛɛ kumakan bɛ na likely include wɛrɛ advanced minɛnw, such as AI-assisted messaging, improved bamanankan na bɔli, ani enhanced baarakɛla experiences. As techayilogy evolves, kumakan bɛ na continue ka taa become wɛrɛ intuitive ani accessible.
global.outro: Platkosɔnms like Chatkosɔnia ye part ka nin shift, helping people connect wɛrɛ nɔgɔya la across kans ani borders.

why.title: Mun kosɔn people switch ka taa Chatkosɔnia
why.subtitle: Chatkosɔnia gives i real tɛlɛfɔn nimɛrɔ, smart bamanankan na bɔli, ani clear path ka taa go ad-hɔrɔn ni i’re ready.

textnow.title: Chatkosɔnia vs TextiSisan
textnow.body: Lighter ads kan Hɔrɔn, simple Plus upgrade ni i’re ready, ani Premium minɛnw TextiSisan doesn’t offer.

voice.title: Chatkosɔnia vs Google Voice
voice.body: Modern aplikeesɔn, duniya bɛɛ-first design, ani built-in bamanankan na bɔli instead ka kɔrɔ-school anle ɲɛsin.

messengers.title: Chatkosɔnia vs chat aplikeesɔns
messengers.body: Texti real tɛlɛfɔn nimɛrɔs — ayit just wɛrɛ aplikeesɔn baarakɛlaw — ni AI ani status built in. Great ni i’re coming ka bɔ aplikeesɔns like TextiHɔrɔn walima TextiMe.

why.disclaimer: Comparison based kan publicly bɛ yen inkosɔnmation ani bɛ se ka falen over time. Wɛrɛ hɔrɔn-textii cili aplikeesɔns like TextiHɔrɔn walima TextiMe ye generbɛɛy similar ka taa TextiSisan.

free.a: Ɔwɔ. Hɔrɔn plan includes Chatkosɔnia nimɛrɔ, anleli, ani messaging ni ads. I bɛ se ka stay kan Hɔrɔn as long as i like, walima upgrade ka taa bɔ ads ani dayɛlɛ wɛrɛ fɛn nafamaw.

plusPremium.q: What’s difference betanen Plus ani Premium?
plusPremium.a: Plus bɔs ads ani extends i ka mesaj history — perfect kosɔn everyday use. Premium adds extra customization, AI minɛnw kosɔn rewrites ani replies, ani priority dɛmɛ kosɔn heavy baarakɛlaw.

esim.q: Yɔrɔ min do eSIM data packs work?
esim.a: Chatkosɔnia Mobile uses duniya bɛɛ eSIM coverage. Availability depends kan i ka country ani minɛn. I’ll see dɛmɛed options during activation inside aplikeesɔn.

cancel.q: Can I dabila walima falen plans dɔ o dɔtime?
cancel.a: Ɔwɔ. I bɛ se ka fɛɛrɛ walima dabila i ka abɔnemaŋ ka bɔ faktirilali ɲɛ kɔnɔ aplikeesɔn. Yɛlɛmaw take effect at end ka i ka sisan faktirilali period.

family.q: Cogo min do Somɔgɔw packs work?
family.a: Somɔgɔw packs da shared data pool across multiple Chatkosɔnia akawuntis. One person pays bill, ani i bɛ se ka anle walima bɔ kɔnɔmɔgɔw ani set limits per person.

intro.body: Nin Gundoya Bolodacogo explains cogo min Chatkosɔnia (“an”, “us”) collects, uses, ani shares inkosɔnmation ni i use an ka aplikeesɔns ani baaras. An design Chatkosɔnia ka taa minimize data an bɛ se ka access.

infoWeCollect.title: Inkosɔnmation an collect
infoWeCollect.account: Akawunti info (e.g., imeeli/phone) ka taa da ani lakanalen i ka akawunti.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Gundolen content (mesajw/anleliw) ye end-to-end gundolen; an can’t read it.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Diagayistic/usage like crash logs, minɛn type, walima coarse analytics ka taa improve perkosɔnmance.

sms.title: Mobile tɛlɛfɔn nimɛrɔs ani SMS
sms.body: Ni i choose ka taa provide mobile tɛlɛfɔn nimɛrɔ, an use it ka taa kɛ fɛn nafamaw such as akawunti verification, login alerts, ani baarakɛla-to-baarakɛla messaging via SMS yɔrɔ min dɛmɛed. An bɛ se ka ci transactional SMS mesajw related ka taa i ka akawunti ani activity kan Chatkosɔnia. I bɛ se ka opt out ka receiving SMS mesajw at dɔ o dɔ time by replying ni dɛmɛed opt-out keyword (such as “STOP”) walima by changing i ka labarali preferences kɔnɔ aplikeesɔn. An do ayit sell i ka tɛlɛfɔn nimɛrɔ walima use it kosɔn unrelated marketing.

sms.title: SMS kumakans
sms.body: Ni i provide mobile tɛlɛfɔn nimɛrɔ, i agree o Chatkosɔnia bɛ se ka ci i SMS mesajw related ka taa i ka akawunti ani use ka baara, such as login alerts, lakanali labaraliw, ani mesajw related ka taa barow i initiate walima participate in. An do ayit use SMS kosɔn promotional walima marketing mesajw ni... tɛ i ka explicit consent. Standard mesaj ani data rates bɛ se ka aplikeesɔnly. I bɛ se ka opt out ka SMS mesajw at dɔ o dɔ time by replying ni dɛmɛed opt-out keyword (kosɔn example, “STOP”) walima by updating i ka labarali labɛnw kɔnɔ aplikeesɔn.

press.title: Press
press.contactLine: Kosɔn media inquiries, reach us at
press.boilerplateBody: Chatkosɔnia ye gundoya-first messaging aplikeesɔn o makes cross-kan chat efkosɔntdɔgɔman. Mesajw ye end-to-end gundolen by default, ani built-in bamanankan na bɔli dɛmɛs 100+ kans kɔnɔ real time. Baarakɛlaw bɛ se ka kɛ mesaj tunulenw, keep kalanlen seerew bɛ se ka kɛ, ani sync across minɛnw. Bɛ yen kan iOS, Android, ani anb.
press.scanTip: I bɛ desktop kan wa? A scan ni i ka tɛlɛfɔn ye walasa ka aplikeesɔn sɔrɔ.

careers.title: Careers
careers.intro: An’re smbɛɛ founding team building Chatkosɔnia — private, duniya bɛɛ messenger launching kan anb, iOS, ani Android. Ni i care about gundoya, gundolali, ani delightful baarakɛla experiences, an’d love ka taa hear ka bɔ i.
careers.openRoles: Dayɛlɛ founding roles: Lead Full-stack Engineer, Backend Engineer (Ayide.js), Frontend/Anb Engineer (React), Mobile Engineer (iOS), Mobile Engineer (Android), DevOps/SRE, Lakanali & Gundolali Engineer, Telecom Engineer (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: Cogo min ka taa aplikeesɔnly: Use button below ka taa imeeli i ka resume ani linkis.
careers.whyBullets: • Help build foundation ka kura duniya bɛɛ messenger. • Ship improvements used across anb, iOS, ani Android. • Work directly ni founder kan architecture ani product direction. • Own high-impact areas ka stack: messaging, voice, wideyo, gundolali, telecom, AI. • Fara at beginning — ɲɛ baarakɛla base scales.

about.title: About Chatkosɔnia
about.description: Chatkosɔnia ye lakanalen, multilingual messenger ni kun-na-kun gundolali, instant bamanankan na bɔli, ani voice/wideyo anleli. An ka mission ye simple: help people connect—safely, privately, ani across kans.

values.access: Access kosɔn bɛɛ: Auto-bamanankan na bɔ 100+ kans.
values.control: Jɔyɔrɔ: Mesaj tunulenw & kalanlen seerew ye bɛ se ka kɛ.
values.access_aria: Access kosɔn bɛɛ: Auto-bamanankan na bɔ 100+ kans.
values.control_aria: Jɔyɔrɔ: Mesaj tunulenw ani kalanlen seerew ye bɛ se ka kɛ.

about.howDescription: Mesajw ye gundolen kan i ka minɛn ɲɛ they leave it. Bamanankan na bɔli, kɔfɛ-maras, ani minɛn sync ye designed ka taa minimize mun an ka servers bɛ se ka see.
